leagueBriefing: The World Baseball Classic pool play reached a fever pitch on Monday as the United States fended off a gritty Mexico squad to stay perfect, while the Dominican Republic showcased its terrifying offensive depth in a blowout win over Israel. In Tokyo, Korea finally got into the win column with a dominant showing against Australia, keeping their tournament hopes alive in a crowded Pool B.

games.headline: Skenes dominates as United States holds off Mexico to stay undefeated
games.brief: The United States moved to 3-0 in pool play, but they had to earn every bit of it against a determined Mexican team. Paul Skenes lived up to the massive hype, carving through the Mexican lineup early, while the American bats did just enough to stay ahead. Mexico threatened late, but the U.S. bullpen slammed the door to secure a pivotal win in front of a raucous Phoenix crowd.
bullets: Paul Skenes earned the win with a dominant start, surrendering no runs and striking out six over four innings of work.
Garrett Whitlock earned the save, navigating a tense ninth inning to preserve the two-run lead.
Mexico out-hit the Americans 8-7, but three costly defensive errors ultimately proved to be the difference.
The U.S. offense was sparked by a balanced attack, with five different players recording an RBI.
games.context: The United States clinches a spot in the quarterfinals with this victory, while Mexico faces a must-win scenario in their final pool play game.

games.headline: Dominican Republic flexes muscles in lopsided victory over Israel
games.brief: The Dominican Republic reminded the world why they are tournament favorites, dismantling Israel in a game that was never truly competitive. Brayan Bello set the tone on the mound, and the star-studded lineup followed suit, putting up ten runs on just seven hits by capitalizing on walks and timely power. It was a clinical performance that moved the D.R. to the top of Pool D.
bullets: Brayan Bello was sharp, allowing only one run over five innings to pick up his first win of the Classic.
The Dominican offense showed incredible plate discipline, drawing eight walks to supplement their seven hits.
Israel was held to just two hits all game as the Dominican bullpen provided four innings of hitless relief.
This win marks the third straight double-digit run performance for the Dominicans in this tournament.
games.context: The Dominican Republic moves to 3-0, effectively securing their path to the knockout stage.

highlights.title: Dominican Republic vs. Israel 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Korea keeps tournament hopes alive with convincing win over Australia
games.brief: Facing a virtual must-win situation, Korea delivered a composed and efficient performance to take down Australia in Tokyo. Korea's hitters found the gaps early and often, racking up 10 hits to provide plenty of cushion for their pitching staff. Australia struggled to string hits together, and Korea's defense remained flawless to ensure there was no late-inning drama.
bullets: Starting pitcher Son was brilliant, throwing four shutout innings to earn the win and lower his tournament ERA to 0.00.
Korea's lineup featured a balanced attack with seven different players recording a hit.
Australia's Luke Wells took the loss after being chased early during a four-run Korean rally.
The victory draws both teams level at 2-2 in Pool B standings.
games.context: This result creates a logjam in Pool B, with tiebreaker scenarios likely to determine who advances alongside Japan.

highlights.title: Korea vs. Australia 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Colombia edges Panama in a defensive duel for first Classic win
games.brief: In a tight battle between neighbors, Colombia managed to scratch out a one-run victory over Panama. It wasn't the prettiest game, with Colombia managing only four hits, but they made them count by taking advantage of Panama's missed opportunities. The Colombian bullpen stood tall in the final frames, preserving a slim lead to give the fans in Miami a classic tournament thriller.
bullets: Hayden Bergner pitched through trouble to earn the win, striking out five over 4.2 innings.
Pedro Garcia secured his first save of the tournament with a perfect ninth inning.
Panama out-hit Colombia 7-4 but left eight runners on base during the contest.
Both teams now sit at 1-3, looking to avoid the bottom of the pool standings.
games.context: Colombia avoids elimination from automatic qualification for the next WBC with this vital win.

highlights.title: Colombia vs. Panama 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Great Britain dominates Brazil to claim first victory of the tournament
games.brief: Great Britain put on a clinic in fundamental baseball to cruise past Brazil. Behind a stellar outing from Gill Hill and an offense that pounded out eight hits, the British squad never looked back after an early three-run burst. Brazil's offense was completely neutralized, managing only a single hit as they fell to 0-4 in a disappointing pool play campaign.
bullets: Gill Hill earned the win, allowing just one run while striking out seven over five dominant innings.
Brazil was held to a tournament-low one hit throughout the entire nine-inning game.
Great Britain's defense was perfect, committing zero errors compared to Brazil's one.
The win is Great Britain's first of the 2026 Classic, moving them to 1-3 in Pool C.
games.context: Great Britain secures a likely spot in the next WBC qualifiers, while Brazil will face relegation from the main tournament bracket.

highlights.title: Brazil vs. Great Britain 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Puerto Rico stays perfect as pitching stifles Cuba
games.brief: Puerto Rico continued their march through Pool D with a methodical win over a struggling Cuban side. Eduardo Rodríguez was masterful on the mound, keeping the Cuban hitters off-balance all night. While Cuba’s defense kept them in the game early, they simply couldn't generate enough offense to match the timely hitting of the Puerto Rican stars in front of their home-away-from-home fans in Miami.
bullets: Eduardo Rodríguez earned the win with five scoreless innings, allowing only two hits.
Edwin Díaz came on in the ninth to secure his first save of the tournament with two strikeouts.
Cuba's offense has now been held to one run or fewer in two of their first three games.
Puerto Rico remains unbeaten (3-0) and has allowed the fewest runs in Pool D so far.
games.context: Puerto Rico joins the Dominican Republic at the top of the 'Pool of Death,' setting up a massive clash for the top seed.

games.headline: Venezuela cruises past Nicaragua behind flawless pitching performance
games.brief: Venezuela remained undefeated in pool play with a clinical shutout victory over Nicaragua. Yohander Gómez led a parade of Venezuelan pitchers that completely silenced the Nicaraguan bats. While Nicaragua actually out-hit Venezuela 7-5, three costly errors and a complete lack of situational hitting doomed them, leaving Venezuela comfortably at the top of the standings.
bullets: Yohander Gómez earned the win, scattering three hits over four innings of scoreless work.
Nicaragua stranded nine runners on base and committed three errors that led to two unearned runs.
Venezuela is now 3-0, maintaining a perfect record heading into the final day of pool play.
Nicaragua falls to 0-4, finishing their tournament without a victory.
games.context: Venezuela clinches a quarterfinal berth with the win, while Nicaragua will have to re-qualify for the 2030 tournament.
